mapper.select: select * from tb_product where is_deleted = 0 order by create_time desc
select * from tb_product where product_id = #{productId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into tb_product(product_name, category_id, price, specification, product_image, origin, remark, stock_quantity, stock_threshold, status, supplier_id, create_time, is_deleted) values(#{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{specification}, #{productImage}, #{origin}, #{remark}, #{stockQuantity}, #{stockThreshold}, #{status}, #{supplierId}, now(), 0)
mapper.update: update tb_product set stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{quantity} where product_id = #{productId}
update tb_product set is_deleted = 1 where product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: select * from tb_product where is_deleted = 0 order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from tb_product where is_deleted = 0
select * from tb_product where stock_quantity < stock_threshold and status = 0 and is_deleted = 0
